case_title: RUI WANG VS. PACE LEARNING CENTERS INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, RUI AS TO DEFENDANT PACE LEARNING CENTERS INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
